message:
fix(web): address web vitals implementation issues

1. Remove entries field from WebVitalMetric - PerformanceEntry objects
   don't serialize cleanly to JSON
2. Remove non-existent Vercel Analytics API (window.vercel.logWebVitals)
3. Fix API route for serverless: remove in-memory buffer pattern that
   doesn't persist between cold starts, use structured logging instead
4. Add proper validation for rating field and optional fields

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
